title: Cobblemon Armor Plus
description:
[Important: this needs Optifine and Optifabric to work; and make sure to turn on custom armor in settings] 
A data/resource pack which adds extra armor in the Cobblemon Mod, all designed after the main line games
body:
A data/resource which adds additional armor sets in the Cobblemon Mod all designed after main-line villains 

For recipes check images and replace the Cobblemon Items for different sets 

Recipe:              
   
 Grunts (diamond)       -      Cobblemon Item 

- Team Magma:             magmarizer
- Team Aqua:                 never melt ice 
- Team Plasma:             silk scarf 
-  Neo-Team Plasma:   black belt 
- Team Rocket:              heavy-duty boots 
- Team Galactic:            upgrade 
- Team Flair:                   focus band 
- Team Skull:                 spell tag

Leaders  (netherite)      -    Cobblemon Item

- Archie :       never melt ice
- Maxie:         magmarizer
- Cyrus:         upgrade
- N:                 silk scarf
- Giovanni:    heavy duty boots

**Installation guide YOU WILL NEED THE FOLLOWING MODS** for the textures to show, A more clear guide on how to use:

1. For **Forge** download optifine (make sure it's for minecraft 1.19.2) mod and place it in your mods folder.

For **Fabric** download optifine (make sure it's for minecraft 1.19.2) and download optifabric as well (make sure it's ver. 1.13.15 or .16 as they run for minecraft 1.19.2), and place them in your mods folder

Make sure to have `options-> video settings-> quality -> custom items [on]`

2. Download the datapack and place it in `resource packs` from your options. **Make sure to press f3+T in-game to refresh all your resource packs**

Place the same datapack in ` World folder -> datapacks` as well, if on single player just click on `edit` when selecting your world and will have the option to open the world folder.

And you're done.

KEEP IN MIND: during the crafting it will show normal diamond/netherite armor pieces, but they will work fine (if they appear with the right crafting pattern, it's all good)


I have a mod version where crafting is less scuffed: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobble-armor-plus

Enjoy
